tickets.subject: Payment failed for ride
tickets.description: I was charged twice for my ride yesterday. The payment went through but the ride was cancelled. Need refund.

messages.content: Hello! I'm experiencing a payment issue with my recent ride. I was charged twice but the ride was cancelled.
Hi there! I understand your concern about the double charge. Let me look into this for you. Can you please provide your ride ID or the transaction details?
Sure, my ride ID is RIDE-2024-001-12345 and the transaction ID is TXN-789456

Thank you for providing those details. I can see the issue now. The double charge occurred due to a system glitch. I've initiated a refund for the duplicate charge. You should see it in your account within 3-5 business days.

tickets.subject: Driver didn't show up
tickets.description: Booked a ride but the driver never arrived. Waited for 15 minutes and had to cancel. Need compensation for the inconvenience.

messages.content: Hi, I booked a ride yesterday but the driver never showed up. I waited for 15 minutes and had to cancel. This was very inconvenient.
I apologize for this experience. Can you please share your ride details so I can investigate what happened?
Ride ID: RIDE-2024-001-12346, booked for 2:30 PM yesterday
Thank you. I can see the driver was assigned but there was a technical issue with the GPS tracking. We're investigating this and will provide compensation for your inconvenience.

tickets.subject: App keeps crashing
tickets.description: The app crashes every time I try to book a ride. This has been happening for the past 2 days.

messages.content: The app keeps crashing when I try to book a ride. This is very frustrating.
I'm sorry to hear about this issue. Can you tell me what device and OS version you're using?
Thank you. This is a known issue with iOS 17.2. We've released an update (version 2.1.3) that should fix this. Please update your app from the App Store.
Updated the app and it's working perfectly now. Thank you!

tickets.subject: Can't update profile picture
tickets.description: Trying to upload a new profile picture but it keeps failing. The image is under 5MB and in JPG format.

messages.content: I can't upload a new profile picture. The upload keeps failing.
Can you try clearing the app cache and restarting the app? This usually resolves upload issues.

tickets.subject: Safety concern about driver
tickets.description: The driver was driving recklessly and not following traffic rules. This was very unsafe.

messages.content: I have a serious safety concern about a driver. He was driving recklessly and not following traffic rules.

categories.name: Technical Issue
categories.description: App crashes, login problems, GPS issues

categories.name: Ride Related
categories.description: Driver issues, ride cancellations, fare disputes

categories.name: Safety & Security
categories.description: Safety concerns, security issues, emergency situations

priorities.name: High
priorities.description: Payment issues, safety concerns, app crashes
